rulings.Case Title: RAYMOND CRONIN et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, AUGUST 14, 2008, LINE 1, DEFENDANT TAP DELAWARE CORP.'S MOTION For Sanctions IS DENIED. PLAINTIFFS HAVE SET FORTH FACTS THAT DEMONSTRATE A GOOD FAITH BASIS FOR THE ALLEGATIONS AGAINST DEFENDANT. IT IS SUFFICIENT THAT THOSE FACTS ARE PRESENTED TO THE COURT PRIOR TO THE MOTION BEING HEARD. =(302/PJM/AY)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES CARMICHAEL VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Quash Service For Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, AUGUST 14, 2008, LINE 2, DEFENDANT THE LEAVITT MACHINE COMPANY'S MOTION To Quash Service For Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 14, 2008 TO ALLOW FOR JURISDICTIONAL DISCOVERY. PARTIES TO FILE SUPPLEMENTAL OPPOSITION AND REPLY IN ACCORDANCE WITH CCP 1005(b). =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: MAN-LI HUANG VS. CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER, A CALIFORNIA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorney'S Fees;
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, AUGUST 14, 2008, LINE 5, DEFENDANTS CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER, KARMI OBERWAGER, LIN VELASQUEZ, AND ELIZABETH AVANTS Motion For Attorney's Fees IS CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 4, 2008. PARTIES TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE FOLLOWING: (1)DEFENDANT TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPY OF OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO TAX; (2)DEFENDANT TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPY OF MOTION FOR ATTORNEYS FEES. PLEASE SUBMIT COPIES WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: COASTSIDE LUMBER SUPPLY INC A CALIFORNIA VS. MARTIN GERARD CURRAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement; Declarations Of Gregory Stubbs, James Attridge, Martin Curren, And Richard C. Stromberg In Support
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, AUGUST 14, 2008, LINE 6, DEFENDANT MARTIN CURREN'S Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement IS DENIED. CCP SECTION 664.6 REQUIRES THAT THE PARTIES SIGN THE AGREEMENT FOR IT TO BE ENFORCEABLE BY A MOTION. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, AUGUST 14, 2008, LINE 7, DEFENDANT GOLDEN STATE CARPET SERVICE, INC.'S Motion To Confirm Good Faith Settlement IS OFF CALENDAR PER MOVING PARTY. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: MALIMO'S A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY VS. MALIBU PIER PARTNERS LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, AUGUST 14, 2008, LINE 12, CROSS-COMPLAINANTS ALEXANDER LEFF AND MALIBU PIER PARTNERS LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, A HEARING IS REQUIRED. IT APPEARS THAT DEFENDANT IS ENTITLED TO SUMMARY JUDGMENT FOR THE REASONS SET FORTH IN DEFENDANTS' AMENDED PROPOSED ORDER FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. THE COURT ONLY RECEIVED THE FIRST FOUR PAGES OF THE SADOSKY DECLARATION AND CANNOT MAKE A FINAL RULING UNTIL THE DECLARATION IS REVIEWED AND DEFENDANTS' OBJECTIONS ARE CONSIDERED. PLAINTIFF IS TO APPEAR WITH THE DECLARATION AND ADDRESS DEFENDANTS' OBJECTIONS. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: CRAIG YATES VS. UNION SQUARE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Demurrer For Abatement Of Action (Ccp 430.10(C); Request For Judicial Notice In Support Of Demurrer
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, AUGUST 14, 2008, LINE 9, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO UPTOWN PARKING CORPORATION'S Demurrer For Abatement Of Action (Ccp 430.10(C) IS GRANTED. THE FEDERAL AND STATE ACTIONS OVERLAP AND THE APPELLATE COURTS ARE IN THE PROCESS OF RESOLVING THE ISSUE THAT CAUSED THE DISTRICT COURT TO DECLINE TO HEAR PLAINTIFF'S STATE LAW CLAIMS. =(302/PJM/AY)
